nasb.text: “So I fell down before the Lord the forty days and nights, which I did because the Lord had said He would destroy you.

esv.text: “So I lay prostrate before the Lord for these forty days and forty nights, because the Lord had said he would destroy you.

cnv.text: “因為耶和華說要消滅你們，我就俯伏在耶和華面前，共俯伏了四十晝夜。

ccb.text: “因为耶和华说要毁灭你们，我就俯伏在耶和华面前四十昼夜，
